_source: Google Analytics certification, SEMrush data, Conversion optimization case studies
_note: Long-tail marketing data. SEO technical details, PPC bid strategies, conversion rate optimization tactics.

title_tag.mistakes: Keyword stuffing; duplicate titles across pages; missing brand; too generic

meta_description.optimal_length: 150-160 characters; not a ranking factor but affects CTR
meta_description.example: Learn SEO from experts. 50+ video tutorials, tools, and templates. Start free trial today.

header_tags.h1: One per page; includes primary keyword; describes page topic
header_tags.h2_h3: Subheadings; include secondary keywords; improve readability
header_tags.structure: Logical hierarchy; H2 under H1, H3 under H2

internal_linking.link_depth: Important pages within 3 clicks from homepage
internal_linking.orphan_pages: Pages with no internal links; crawl issues; add to sitemap and link from relevant content

core_web_vitals.lcp: Largest Contentful Paint <2.5s; main content visible

site_speed.optimization: Compress images (WebP); minify CSS/JS; lazy load; CDN; defer non-critical JS

mobile_optimization.mobile_first_indexing: Google uses mobile version for ranking; must be mobile-responsive
mobile_optimization.tap_targets: Buttons >48px; sufficient spacing; avoid mobile popup penalties

crawlability.robots_txt: Allow/disallow crawlers; block admin, search results, duplicate content
crawlability.sitemap_xml: List all URLs; update frequency; priority; submit to Search Console
crawlability.crawl_budget: Large sites (>10k pages); fix broken links; remove duplicate content; use canonical tags

structured_data.schema_markup: JSON-LD format; helps rich snippets (stars, FAQ, breadcrumbs)
structured_data.types: Product (price, reviews); Article (author, date); LocalBusiness (hours, address); Recipe; Event
structured_data.testing: Google Rich Results Test; validate markup; check eligibility

quality_signals.domain_authority: Moz DA, Ahrefs DR; 0-100 scale; >50 is strong
quality_signals.relevance: Links from same industry/topic worth more than unrelated
quality_signals.anchor_text: Mix of exact match, partial, branded, naked URL; avoid over-optimization
quality_signals.dofollow_vs_nofollow: Dofollow passes PageRank; nofollow doesn't (but still valuable for traffic)

tactics.guest_posting: Write for industry blogs; include link in author bio or content; avoid low-quality link farms
tactics.broken_link_building: Find broken links on industry sites; suggest your content as replacement; Ahrefs broken link checker
tactics.skyscraper_technique: Find top content for keyword; create better/longer version; reach out to sites linking to original
tactics.digital_pr: Newsworthy content; HARO (Help A Reporter Out); get press coverage; earns high-authority links

avoid.pbn: Private Blog Networks; footprint detected; manual penalty
avoid.link_schemes: Reciprocal link exchanges; paid links without nofollow; anchor text manipulation
avoid.low_quality: Directory submissions; blog comment spam; forum signature links

campaign_structure.account_hierarchy: Account > Campaign (budget, location, schedule) > Ad Group (keywords, ads) > Ads & Keywords
campaign_structure.single_keyword_ad_groups: SKAG; one keyword per ad group; highly relevant ads; better QS; labor-intensive
campaign_structure.themed_ad_groups: 5-20 related keywords; easier to manage; slight QS sacrifice

keyword_match_types.broad_match: Widest reach; includes synonyms, misspellings, related; 'running shoes' shows for 'athletic footwear'
keyword_match_types.phrase_match: "running shoes"; matches phrase + additional words; 'best running shoes' qualifies
keyword_match_types.exact_match: [running shoes]; close variants only; most control; lowest reach
keyword_match_types.negative_keywords: Exclude irrelevant searches; 'free' if selling paid products; 'jobs' if not hiring

quality_score.components: Expected CTR (40%), Ad Relevance (25%), Landing Page Experience (35%)
quality_score.score_range: 1-10; 7+ is good; affects ad rank and CPC
quality_score.improving: Match ad copy to keywords; improve landing page relevance and speed; increase CTR with compelling copy

bidding_strategies.manual_cpc: Full control; set max CPC per keyword; time-intensive; good for testing
bidding_strategies.enhanced_cpc: Manual + Google adjusts up to +30% for likely conversions; moderate automation
bidding_strategies.target_cpa: Automated; optimize for cost per acquisition; needs 30+ conversions/month for learning
bidding_strategies.target_roas: Optimize for return on ad spend; e.g., target 400% ROAS ($4 revenue per $1 spend); needs conversion value tracking
bidding_strategies.maximize_conversions: Fully automated; spends budget to get most conversions; can overspend if not monitored

ad_copy_best_practices.responsive_search_ads: 15 headlines, 4 descriptions; Google tests combinations; include keyword in 2-3 headlines

headline_formulas.question: Need Running Shoes? Shop Now
headline_formulas.cta: Buy Running Shoes Today - Free Shipping

extensions.sitelink: Additional links (Sale, Reviews, Contact); increase CTR 10-15%
extensions.callout: Free Shipping, 24/7 Support, Price Match Guarantee
extensions.call: Phone number; mobile only; call tracking
extensions.location: Address; local businesses; ties to Google My Business

landing_page_elements.headline: Clear value prop; match ad copy; 'Get 50% Off Running Shoes' if ad promised 50% off
landing_page_elements.hero_image: Relevant; high-quality; shows product/result; faces/people increase trust
landing_page_elements.cta_button: Contrasting color; action-oriented text ('Start Free Trial' > 'Submit'); above fold + repeated below
landing_page_elements.social_proof: Reviews (4.8★ 2,400 reviews); testimonials; logos of known customers; 'As seen in Forbes'
landing_page_elements.form_optimization: Fewer fields = higher conversion; only ask essential info; multi-step forms can increase completion

ab_testing.what_to_test: Headline, CTA copy/color, form fields, page layout, pricing display, social proof
ab_testing.sample_size: Minimum 100 conversions per variant; 95% statistical significance; avoid peeking early
ab_testing.testing_duration: 1-2 weeks minimum; account for weekly cycles; B2B needs longer (buying cycles)
ab_testing.tool: Google Optimize, VWO, Optimizely; prioritize tests by potential impact × ease

persuasion_principles.scarcity: Only 3 left in stock; Sale ends in 24 hours; increases urgency
persuasion_principles.social_proof: 12,000 customers; Best seller; Featured in NYT; reduces perceived risk
persuasion_principles.authority: Recommended by doctors; Award-winning; 20 years experience; builds credibility
persuasion_principles.reciprocity: Free trial; Free shipping; Free ebook; creates obligation to give back
persuasion_principles.commitment: Multi-step forms; 'Start with email' → 'Add name' → 'Choose plan'; foot-in-door technique

google_analytics_4.key_events: Conversions renamed to key events; purchase, sign_up, contact, download
google_analytics_4.engagement_rate: Engaged sessions / total sessions; >10 sec or 2+ pages or conversion
google_analytics_4.attribution: Data-driven attribution (DDA) default; credits touchpoints by ML; replaces last-click

conversion_funnel.awareness: Traffic sources; top channels: organic, paid, direct, social, referral
conversion_funnel.acquisition: Landing page views; bounce rate <40% is good; >70% investigate
conversion_funnel.activation: Key action taken; account created, video watched, product viewed
conversion_funnel.revenue: Purchase; average order value (AOV); conversion rate 2-5% typical ecommerce
conversion_funnel.retention: Repeat purchase rate; cohort analysis; email remarketing

attribution_models.last_click: 100% credit to last touchpoint; undervalues top-of-funnel
attribution_models.first_click: 100% credit to first touchpoint; ignores nurturing
attribution_models.linear: Equal credit to all touchpoints; simple but ignores importance
attribution_models.time_decay: More credit to recent touchpoints; 7-day half-life typical
attribution_models.data_driven: ML model; analyzes actual conversion paths; most accurate but needs volume
